questions.question: 1. HPTLC is superior than TLC in terms of -

explanations.b: HPTLC offers better resolution than conventional TLC.
explanations.c: HPTLC allows densitometric scanning and quantification.
explanations.d: Correct. HPTLC is superior in separation efficiency, resolution, and scanning capabilities.

questions.question: 2. Which loading gas is used in HPTLC?

explanations.d: Correct. Nitrogen is commonly used as the loading gas in HPTLC sample applicators.

explanations.d: Correct. Caffeine is commonly found in all these beverages.

explanations.b: Below the generally accepted maximum dose.
